72yqb8jwj9a6g4nx.d3_code:
const svg = d3.select("svg");

svg.selectAll(".point-marks circle")
  .filter(function() {
    const year = d3.select(this).attr("data-x-value");
    return ["2005", "2006", "2008", "2009", "2010"].includes(year);
  })
  .attr("r", 4)
  .attr("fill", "#4f46e5")
  .attr("opacity", 0.85)
  .attr("stroke", null)
  .attr("stroke-width", null)
  .transition()
  .duration(500)
  .attr("r", 6)
  .attr("fill", "#d97706")
  .attr("opacity", 1)
  .attr("stroke", "#fff")
  .attr("stroke-width", 1.5);

svg.select(".annotation-layer line")
  .attr("x2", 26)
  .transition()
  .delay(500)
  .duration(800)
  .attr("x2", 234);

svg.select(".annotation-layer text")
  .attr("opacity", 0)
  .transition()
  .delay(1300)
  .duration(500)
  .attr("opacity", 1);

const svg = d3.select("svg");

svg.selectAll(".point-marks circle")
  .filter(function() {
    const year = d3.select(this).attr("data-x-value");
    return ["2011", "2012", "2013", "2014", "2015"].includes(year);
  })
  .attr("r", 4)
  .attr("fill", "#4f46e5")
  .attr("opacity", 0.85)
  .attr("stroke", null)
  .attr("stroke-width", null)
  .transition()
  .duration(500)
  .attr("r", 6)
  .attr("fill", "#10b981")
  .attr("opacity", 1)
  .attr("stroke", "#fff")
  .attr("stroke-width", 1.5);

  .attr("x2", 286)
  .transition()
  .delay(500)
  .duration(800)
  .attr("x2", 494);

svg.select(".avg-text-2")
  .attr("opacity", 0)
  .transition()
  .delay(1300)
  .duration(500)
  .attr("opacity", 1);

d3.selectAll('path[data-series="Dissatisfied"]')
  .attr('stroke-width', 2)
  .transition().duration(800)
  .attr('stroke-width', 4);

  .transition().duration(800)
  .attr('r', 6)
  .attr('opacity', 1);

  .transition().duration(800)
  .attr('opacity', 0.3);

  .attr('opacity', 0.85)
  .transition().duration(800)
  .attr('opacity', 0.3);

  .attr('opacity', 0.3);

  .attr('opacity', 1)
  .transition().duration(800)
  .attr('opacity', 0.3);

  .attr('x2', 0)
  .transition().duration(800)
  .attr('x2', 510);

d3.select('.avg-text-dissatisfied')
  .attr('opacity', 0)

d3.selectAll('.yearly-diff-lines line')
  .attr('y2', function() { return d3.select(this).attr('y1'); })
  .transition()
  .duration(600)
  .delay((d, i) => i * 100)
  .attr('y2', function() { return d3.select(this).attr('data-target-y2'); });

1gdzafocxmz7rswi.d3_code:
const svg = d3.select(document.querySelector('svg'));
const annotationLayer = svg.select('.annotation-layer');

annotationLayer.selectAll('.threshold-line').remove();
annotationLayer.selectAll('.threshold-label').remove();

const line = annotationLayer.append('line')
  .attr('class', 'threshold-line')
  .attr('x1', 0)
  .attr('y1', 121.6)
  .attr('x2', 0)
  .attr('y2', 121.6)
  .attr('stroke', '#d62728')
  .attr('stroke-width', 2)
  .attr('stroke-dasharray', '5,5');

line.transition()
  .duration(800)
  .attr('x2', 520);

annotationLayer.append('text')
  .attr('class', 'threshold-label')
  .attr('x', 260)
  .attr('y', 116.6)
  .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')
  .attr('font-size', '14px')
  .attr('font-weight', 'bold')
  .attr('fill', '#d62728')
  .attr('opacity', 0)
  .text('Difference: 126')
  .transition()
  .delay(800)
  .duration(400)
  .attr('opacity', 1);

d3.selectAll('rect[data-id="Russia|Nonsurgical|all"], rect[data-id="Germany|Nonsurgical|all"], rect[data-id="France|Nonsurgical|all"], rect[data-id="Italy|Nonsurgical|all"]')
  .transition()
  .duration(800)
  .attr("opacity", 0.2);

const euroPanels = ['Russia', 'Germany', 'France', 'Italy'];
euroPanels.forEach(country => {
  d3.select(`g[data-chart-id="${country}"]`)
    .append("line")
    .attr("class", "euro-avg-line")
    .attr("x1", 0)
    .attr("x2", 220)
    .attr("y1", 271.46)
    .attr("y2", 271.46)
    .attr("stroke", "#2563eb")
    .attr("stroke-width", 2)
    .attr("stroke-dasharray", "4,4")
    .attr("opacity", 0)
    .transition()
    .duration(800)
    .attr("opacity", 1);
});

const annotationLayer = d3.select('.annotation-layer');
const avgGroup = annotationLayer.append("g")
  .attr("id", "euro-avg-annotation")
  .attr("opacity", 0);

avgGroup.append("rect")
  .attr("x", 1660)
  .attr("y", 20)
  .attr("width", 280)
  .attr("height", 40)
  .attr("fill", "white")
  .attr("stroke", "#2563eb")
  .attr("stroke-width", 2)
  .attr("rx", 5);

avgGroup.append("text")
  .attr("x", 1800)
  .attr("y", 45)
  .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
  .attr("fill", "#2563eb")
  .attr("font-size", "16")
  .attr("font-weight", "bold")
  .text("European Surgical Avg: 266,352");

avgGroup.transition()
  .duration(800)
  .attr("opacity", 1);

0gacqohbzj07n25s.d3_code:
d3.selectAll('rect[data-id="India|Nonsurgical|all"], rect[data-id="Turkey|Nonsurgical|all"], rect[data-id="Japan|Nonsurgical|all"]')
  .transition()
  .duration(800)
  .attr("opacity", 0.2);

const asianPanels = ['India', 'Turkey', 'Japan'];
asianPanels.forEach(country => {
  d3.select(`g[data-chart-id="${country}"]`)
    .append("line")
    .attr("class", "asian-avg-line")
    .attr("x1", 0)
    .attr("x2", 220)
    .attr("y1", 264.42)
    .attr("y2", 264.42)
    .attr("stroke", "#10b981")
    .attr("stroke-width", 2)
    .attr("stroke-dasharray", "4,4")
    .attr("opacity", 0)
    .transition()
    .duration(800)
    .attr("opacity", 1);
});

const annotationLayer = d3.select('.annotation-layer');
const avgGroup = annotationLayer.append("g")
  .attr("id", "asian-avg-annotation")
  .attr("opacity", 0);

avgGroup.append("rect")
  .attr("x", 1960)
  .attr("y", 20)
  .attr("width", 250)
  .attr("height", 40)
  .attr("fill", "white")
  .attr("stroke", "#10b981")
  .attr("stroke-width", 2)
  .attr("rx", 5);

avgGroup.append("text")
  .attr("x", 2085)
  .attr("y", 45)
  .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
  .attr("fill", "#10b981")
  .attr("font-size", "16")
  .attr("font-weight", "bold")
  .text("Asian Surgical Avg: 332,067");

avgGroup.transition()
  .duration(800)
  .attr("opacity", 1);

const layer = d3.select('.annotation-layer');

  .attr('y2', 216)

  .attr('stroke-width', 2)
  .attr('stroke-dasharray', '5,5')
  .transition()
  .duration(500)
  .attr('x2', 806)
  .attr('y2', 58);

  .attr('x', 540.5)
  .attr('y', 125)
  .attr('width', 190)
  .attr('height', 24)
  .attr('fill', 'white')
  .attr('opacity', 0)
  .attr('rx', 4)
  .transition()
  .delay(500)
  .duration(500)
  .attr('opacity', 0.9);

  .attr('opacity', 0)

  .delay(500)

d3.selectAll('.main-bar')
  .filter(function() {
    const target = d3.select(this).attr('data-target');
    const val = d3.select(this).attr('data-value');
    return target === '18–29' && val !== '6';
  })
  .transition()
  .duration(800)
  .attr('opacity', 0.2);

d3.select('.annotation-layer')
  .append('text')
  .attr('x', 15)
  .attr('y', 184.8)
  .attr('text-anchor', 'end')
  .attr('dominant-baseline', 'central')
  .attr('font-size', '14')
  .attr('font-weight', 'bold')
  .attr('fill', '#000')
  .attr('opacity', 0)
  .text('6')
  .transition()
  .delay(800)
  .duration(400)
  .attr('opacity', 1);
